'''Kram Ayuk''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Gran/Legends|Gran]] from [[Hok/Legends|Hok]] who worked for [[RavinsBlud Crime Syndicate]] during the waning [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. He was wanted by the [[Coruscant Security Force/Legends|Coruscant Security Force]] for questioning, involving smuggling of [[Death stick/Legends|death sticks]] on [[Malastare/Legends|Malastare]].

==Biography==
In [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]], Ayuk had known connections to the [[RavinsBlud Crime Syndicate]], working for them before the Battle of Naboo.

Later on, he stayed in the smuggling business by working for [[Sebolto]], a Dug crimelord. He smuggled [[Death stick/Legends|death sticks]] and was one of the causes of the sudden rise in [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant's]] death stick dealings.

A bounty was posted on him, 5,000 credits alive, 2,500 dead. While on Malastare, [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]] secured the bounty.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Bounty Hunter]]'' {{1st}}
